tasks.build: deno task --cwd wasmatrix build && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl build && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu build
tasks.coverage: deno task --cwd wasmatrix coverage && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl test && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu test
tasks.coverage:codecov: deno task --cwd wasmatrix coverage:codecov && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl test && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu test
tasks.docs:build: npm --prefix wasmatrix/docs ci && deno task --cwd wasmatrix docs:build
tasks.fmt: deno task --cwd wasmatrix fmt && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl fmt && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu fmt
tasks.lint: deno task --cwd wasmatrix lint && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl lint && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu lint
tasks.pages:build: npm --prefix wasmatrix/docs ci && deno task --cwd wasmatrix pages:build && node wasmatrix/scripts/sync-pages-build.mjs
tasks.test: deno task --cwd wasmatrix test && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gl test && deno task --cwd wasmatrix-gpu test
